zh.lifeSummary: 當Albert II von Gorizia於1275年出生在奧地利曲斯藍德格時，他的父親Albert I von Gorizia35歲，母親Euphemia Von Glogau21歲。他於1299年3月16日與Euphemia Von Mätsch結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年在義大利維圖維其亞維其亞享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Albert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Albert II von Gorizia was born in 1275, in Görz, Küstenland, Austria, his father, Albert I von Gorizia, was 35 and his mother, Euphemia Von Glogau, was 21. He married Euphemia Von Mätsch on 16 March 1299. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1327, in Venice, Venice, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 52.

Il a épousé Euphemia Von Mätsch le 16 mars 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1327, à Venise, Venezia, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Albert II von Gorizia(이)가 1275년 오스트리아 ku스텐랜드 그o르즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert I von Gorizia(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphemia Von Glogau(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1299년 3월 16일 Euphemia Von Mätsch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 이탈리아 븐토 븐지아 븐지아에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albert II von Gorizia родился в 1275 г. в местности гoрз, кuстенланд, Австрия, его отцу по имени Albert I von Gorizia было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphemia Von Glogau, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Euphemia Von Mätsch 16 марта 1299 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности винезя, винезя, винето, Италия в возрасте 52 лет.
